The '''''Anvil''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Warship/Legends|warship]] collected the evacuees from the destroyed [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]''. Soon afterward, being in need of supplies, she was boarded by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Lauhu]]'', but during that operation she was endangered by an assault led by the Imperial escort frigate ''[[Firelance]]''. This attack severely damaged the frigate and there was no time to repair it. The Imperial CR90 corvette [[Viper (corvette group)|''Viper'']] was patrolling the area for its task force. The frigate was evacuated and the corvette ''[[Hart]]'' sent [[Transport/Legends|transports]] to collect the personnel. Then, following orders, Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] destroyed the carcass of the frigate to prevent it falling into Imperial hands.

{{Ship-stub}}
